executive_summary.verdict: Agent NOT production-ready. Critical gaps in grounding, HITL coverage, and observability.
executive_summary.single_biggest_risk: Grounding Failure — Agent can hallucinate deal information without querying the database.

top_10_findings: G-001: create_deal not in HITL_TOOLS frozenset — executes without approval
G-002: No grounding enforcement — agent can answer deal questions without tool calls
G-003: Langfuse tracing not configured in production
G-004: System prompt lacks M&A domain intelligence (minimal stage context)
G-005: No tool call budget enforcement (infinite loop risk)
G-006: No prompt versioning (cannot trace which prompt version was used)
G-007: Evals have no CI gate (only 10 golden traces, deployment not blocked on failure)
G-008: No correlation_id propagation across systems
G-010: No deal-scoped memory (cannot recall prior conversations about specific deals)
top_10_recommended_actions: R3-0-1: Add create_deal to HITL_TOOLS frozenset in schemas/agent.py
R3-0-2: Add grounding enforcement to system prompt ('call get_deal before answering deal questions')
R3-0-3: Configure Langfuse API keys in production .env
R3-1-1: Rewrite system prompt with M&A domain context and stage transition rules
R3-2-1: Add tool call budget enforcement (max 10 per turn) in GraphState
R3-1-2: Add prompt version tracking (version field logged with each request)
R3-3-1: Add CI gate that blocks deployment on eval failure
R3-2-2: Add correlation_id header propagation (end-to-end tracing)
R3-3-2: Expand eval suite to 30+ golden traces (currently only 10)
R3-4-1: Evaluate and enable long-term memory with deal-scoped retrieval
top_10_contrarian_risks: FM-001: Agent hallucinates deal details without calling get_deal (HIGH likelihood, HIGH impact)
FM-002: create_deal executes without HITL approval (HIGH likelihood, HIGH impact)
FM-004: LLM gets stuck in tool-calling loop — no tool call budget enforcement
FM-010: Backend down = agent crash — no circuit breaker pattern implemented
FM-006: Prompt injection via user message (basic sanitization only)
FM-014: Long conversation exceeds context window — no token budget management
FM-023: Eval suite passes but production fails (only 10 golden traces)
FM-024: New tool added without HITL consideration (manual HITL_TOOLS update)
FM-019: RAG REST unavailable = search fails hard (no fallback to SQL search)
FM-011: vLLM returns malformed tool call JSON (no robust parsing)
